text:
# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

Welcome to IIT Jammu!

Our campus is spread over 400 acres, at the foothills of the Shivalik range of the Himalayas, at Jagti, a forest area near Jammu City at NH 44.

The first batch of 82 students was admitted in 2016 and started functioning in a nearby temporary campus at Paloura. The operations in the Jagti campus commenced from August 2017. Yes, IIT Jammu is a pioneer among the younger IITs to shift to our permanent campus within the first year of its inception.

Our Jagti campus is well equipped to meet all the basic needs of the students and faculty. From an academic and research perspective, IIT Jammu has 12 academic departments fully equipped with state-of-the-art equipment. From a student's perspective it has modern hostel buildings for girls and boys with fully equipped sports facilities.

IIT Jammu has campus wide ubiquitous **Wi-Fi** and 1 Gbps **internet**connectivity

1. **Excellent connectivity**by Rail, Road, and Air - all within 17 KM of radius. Jammu has excellent connectivity compared to several other cities.
2. Jammu is as **safe**as any other city in the country minus pollution. Jammu is the only city to have an IIT, IIM, AIIMS and Central university and it is home to 100+ central govt funded organizations across domains (education, health, defense, banking, culture, tourism, etc.).
3. The **faculty**strength is about 156 as of June 2026 and growing. Around 180+ families of employees **reside on the campus**. IIT Jammu is a very cosmopolitan mini-India and has a **vibrant community culture.**
4. Overall **placements**have increased above 85% and remains encouraging with many students going for higher education in leading international and national institutions. More details can be obtained from Career Development Services
5. Students are going for national and international **internships**of up to six months under various MoUs that include or

## NIRF Ranking – IIT Jammu

IIT Jammu is ranked **56th in Engineering** as per the **National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) 2026**, published by the Ministry of Education, Government of India. This ranking reflects the institute's growing academic reputation, research output, and student outcomes.

| Category | NIRF Rank (2026) |
|---|---|
| Engineering | 56 |

NIRF rankings are based on five key parameters: Teaching, Learning & Resources (TLR), Research and Professional Practice (RP), Graduation Outcomes (GO), Outreach and Inclusivity (OI), and Perception (PR).

More details: https://www.nirfindia.org/
Why IIT Jammu (Section) in Why IIT Jammu section.
